title: pyrethrum chamaemelifolium
intro: Pyrethrum chamaemelifolium, also known as the pyrethrum daisy or chrysanthemum daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties come from its flowers, which contain pyrethrin, a compound with insecticidal and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of pyrethrum chamaemelifolium include reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and alleviating pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum chamaemelifolium include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
